## CONSULTATION HANDOFF

```
change_type: Fix Bug
feature_name: update-opus-model-id
date: 2026-05-07
advisor: [@devstarter-techlead]
```

---

### Section 1 — Problem / Request

**What the user described:**
```
SDLC runbooks still reference ## Model: Opus (`claude-opus-4-6`)
but the latest model is claude-opus-4-7. Need to update all references.
```

**Change type detected:**
- [ ] Add Feature
- [ ] Modify Feature
- [x] Fix Bug — stale model ID references in 7 files

---

### Section 2 — Analysis Summary

**Situation understood:**
```
The ## Model: headers in SDLC runbooks and devstarter-config.yml
hardcode the Opus model ID. Opus 4-7 is now the latest; the old
claude-opus-4-6 ID is outdated. Sonnet and Haiku IDs are unchanged.
```

**Root cause:**
```
Model IDs are hardcoded strings in 6 SDLC runbooks and 1 config file.
No automation exists to keep them in sync with Claude model releases.
```

**Affected files (7 total):**
```
- sdlc/devstarter-audit.md:3
- sdlc/devstarter-consult.md:3
- sdlc/devstarter-hotfix.md:3
- sdlc/devstarter-incident.md:3
- sdlc/devstarter-migrate.md:3
- sdlc/devstarter-review.md:3
- devstarter-config.yml:52
```

---

### Section 3 — Recommended Approach

**Recommended option:**
```
Option A — Bulk replace claude-opus-4-6 → claude-opus-4-7 in all 7 files,
commit directly on develop as a chore.
```

**Why:**
```
Pure string substitution, no logic change, same category as a version bump.
Treat as a chore commit — no PR overhead needed.
```

**Estimated effort:** XS (< 15 min)

**Risks:**
```
- Minimal — verify grep doesn't touch CHANGELOG.md history references
  (those should stay as historical record of what was used at release time)
```

---

### Section 4 — Acceptance Criteria

**Done when:**
```
Given 7 files reference claude-opus-4-6
When bulk replace applied
Then grep for claude-opus-4-6 returns only CHANGELOG.md historical entries
And devstarter-config.yml opus field = claude-opus-4-7
And all 6 SDLC ## Model: headers show claude-opus-4-7
```

**Regression guard:**
```
- CHANGELOG.md historical entries must NOT be changed
- Sonnet and Haiku model IDs must NOT be changed
```
